content.body: I’ve implemented “customizable select” checking in the HTML checker / https://validator.w3.org/nu/ https://github.com/validator/validator/commit/4affa5bf0fdfa90660ff61978f04bee286503e6d
…and with that the https://github.com/validator/validator/issues issue tracker is down to 0 open issues.
I reckon it’s been at least 10 years since I had that issue tracker down to zero open issues. Maybe not for 15 years even.
